basic_details.job_title: RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026 (Out) – Download Link Here
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk cum Typist, Accounts Clerk cum Typist, Trains Clerk, Commercial cum Ticket Clerk etc.
basic_details.selection_process_brief: CBT-1 + CBT-2 + Skill Test (if applicable) + Document Verification
basic_details.short_information: Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has officially released the City Intimation Slip 2026 for NTPC Undergraduate (UG) examination under CEN 07/2025. Candidates appearing for RRB NTPC UG exam can now download their exam city slip from the official website rrb.digialm.com or their respective regional RRB websites. The city intimation slip contains crucial information about exam city, date, shift timing, and reporting time. This document helps candidates plan their travel and accommodation arrangements before the admit card release. In this article, we provide the direct download link, step-by-step i

faq.question: Q1. When was the RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026 released?
faq.answer: The RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026 was officially released on 27th April 2026. It is being released in phases for candidates whose exams are scheduled between 7th May 2026 and 21st June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. Is RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip the same as Admit Card?
faq.answer: No. The City Intimation Slip is only an advance intimation that provides details like exam city, date, and shift timing for travel planning. The Admit Card is a mandatory document that will be released 4 days before the exam and contains roll number, exact exam center address, photo, and signature.

faq.question: Q3. Can I appear in the RRB NTPC UG Exam without the City Intimation Slip?
faq.answer: Yes. The City Intimation Slip is not required to enter the examination hall. However, you must carry the printed Admit Card along with a valid photo ID proof on the exam day.

faq.question: Q4. What login details are required to download the RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026?
faq.answer: You need your Registration Number / Application Number and Date of Birth (in DD/MM/YYYY format) or Password to log in and download the city intimation slip from the official RRB portal (rrb.digialm.com).

faq.question: Q5. What should I do if there is a mistake in my RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip (wrong exam date or city)?
faq.answer: If you find any discrepancy in your city intimation slip, immediately contact your Regional RRB Helpdesk via email or helpline number. Keep your registration number ready and attach a screenshot of the error. It is advised to report the issue as soon as possible.
